name: Removable Media Data Transfer Detection
description: Detects and responds to unauthorized data transfers to removable media (USB drives, external hard drives, SD cards). Riggs AI analyzes the alert to assess data sensitivity and user intent. Confirmed unauthorized transfers trigger immediate USB port blocking on the endpoint, evidence preservation, user investigation, and SOC notification. Includes an approval gate for account suspension on high-risk transfers. Designed for SOC analysts handling endpoint DLP removable media alerts.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Block USB ports on the endpoint and collect forensic evidence

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create investigation ticket for removable media policy violation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify SOC team and user's manager of policy violation

data.title: Removable Media Transfer Alert
data.summary: Triggers on endpoint DLP alerts for data transfer to removable media

data.title: AI Data Transfer Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI analyzes transferred data sensitivity, volume, and user intent

config.custom_instructions: Analyze the data transferred to removable media. Classify data sensitivity, assess transfer volume against normal patterns, check user authorization for removable media, and evaluate intent (work-from-home, offboarding, theft).

data.title: Unauthorized Transfer?
data.summary: Branch based on whether the removable media transfer is unauthorized

data.title: Block USB Ports on Endpoint
data.summary: Disable USB storage access on the endpoint via EDR to prevent further data transfer

params.reason: Unauthorized data transfer to removable media detected

data.title: Preserve Evidence
data.summary: Log transfer details as forensic evidence for investigation

data.title: Create Investigation Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira ticket for the removable media policy violation investigation

config.title: Removable Media Violation: {{$.trigger.alert.username}} — {{$.trigger.alert.media_type}}

data.title: Notify SOC & Manager
data.summary: Alert SOC team and user's manager about the policy violation

data.title: Close Alert — Authorized Transfer
data.summary: Transfer is authorized or involves non-sensitive data, close alert

config.note: Removable media alert reviewed by Riggs AI. Transfer is authorized (approved exception, non-sensitive data, or approved device). Verdict: {{$.nodes.rm-2.result.verdict}}. Closing alert.
